origin.example: No one knows the origin of this custom.
origin.example_zh: 沒有人知道這個習俗的由來。

owner.example: The owner of the dog is very kind.
owner.example_zh: 這隻狗的主人非常仁慈。

pain.example: He felt a sharp pain in his arm.

painting.example: The painting hangs on the wall.

pajamas.example: He put on his pajamas before bed.

pale.example: She looked pale after the long trip.
pale.example_zh: 長途旅行後她臉色蒼白。

pale.example: The walls are painted pale blue.

pan.example: Heat the oil in a pan.

papaya.example: Papaya is good for your stomach.

pardon.example: Pardon me, could you say that again?

participate.example: Many students participated in the contest.
participate.example_zh: 許多學生參加了這場比賽。

particular.example: Is there a particular book you want?
particular.example_zh: 有沒有你特別想要的書？

partner.example: Find a partner for this activity.
partner.example_zh: 為這個活動找一個搭檔。

password.example: Don't share your password with others.

paste.example: Cut the picture and paste it here.
Mix the powder into a paste.

path.example: We followed the path through the woods.
path.example_zh: 我們沿著小路穿過樹林。

patient.example: The nurse cared for the patient.
Be patient; we will get there soon.

pattern.example: The shirt has a flower pattern.
Her sleep follows a regular pattern.
pattern.example_zh: 她的睡眠有規律的模式。

peace.example_zh: 每個人都希望世界和平。

peace.example: She enjoys the peace of the countryside.

peaceful.example: The village is quiet and peaceful.

peach.example: This peach is soft and sweet.

peak.example: They reached the peak of the mountain.
Traffic is heavy at peak hours.

pear.example: I ate a juicy pear after lunch.
pear.example_zh: 我午餐後吃了一顆多汁的梨子。

per.example: The car runs at sixty miles per hour.

perfect.example: She got a perfect score on the test.
He practiced to perfect his skills.

period.example: This was a happy period of her life.
period.example_zh: 這是她人生中快樂的一段時期。

period.example: We have a short break between periods.
period.example_zh: 兩節課之間有短暫的休息。

phrase.example: Write a sentence using this phrase.
phrase.example_zh: 用這個片語造一個句子。

pillow.example: The pillow is soft and comfortable.

pizza.example: We ordered a large cheese pizza.
pizza.example_zh: 我們點了一個大的起司披薩。

plain.example: She wore a plain white shirt.
plain.example_zh: 她穿著一件樸素的白襯衫。

platform.example: The train arrived at platform two.
The speaker stood on a platform.

playground.example: Children are playing on the playground.

pleasant.example: We had a pleasant afternoon together.
pleasant.example_zh: 我們一起度過了愉快的下午。

plus.example: Good pay is a plus point of this job.
plus.example_zh: 高薪是這份工作的一個優點。

poem.example: She wrote a poem about spring.
poem.example_zh: 她寫了一首關於春天的詩。

poet.example: The poet read his work aloud.
poet.example_zh: 詩人大聲朗讀他的作品。

policy.example: The school has a strict policy on bullying.
policy.example_zh: 學校對霸凌有嚴格的規定。

pop.example: She likes to listen to pop music.

pop.example_zh: 我身後有個氣球啪一聲爆掉。

population.example: The city has a large population.

pork.example: We had pork and rice for dinner.

port.example: The ship sailed into the port.

pose.example: The fire posed a danger to the town.
pose.example_zh: 這場火對城鎮構成危險。

position.example: Put the chair back in its position.
She holds an important position in the company.
position.example_zh: 她在公司擔任重要職位。

positive.example: She always keeps a positive attitude.
positive.example_zh: 她總是保持積極的態度。

positive.example: Are you positive you locked the door?

possibility.example: There is a possibility of rain today.

post.example_zh: 她在網路上貼了一張照片。

post.example: I will post the letter tomorrow.

postcard.example: She sent me a postcard from Paris.
postcard.example_zh: 她從巴黎寄給我一張明信片。

praise.example: The teacher praised her hard work.

pray.example: They pray for peace every day.

president.example: She is the president of the club.
